chunks.text: Page 1 of 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR C.P. No. D- 915 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case For hearing of main case 17-08-2023 Mr. Ghulam Umar S. Rajput, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Assistant A.G a/w Qaisar Ali Hashmi, District Accounts Officer, Sukkur (respondent No.6). ****** The District Accounts Officer, Sukkur submits that if the petitioner submits bank statement of her late mother, namely, Jamila Nazir/pensioner, case of the petitioner for family pension, as prayed before this Court, would be processed and finalized. If the bank statement is filed before 20th of this month, hopefully, her case will be processed and finalized this month after adjustment of amount deposited in the bank account of late pensioner after her death, and share of the petitioner would be given to her. Learned counsel for the petitioner submits that besides family pension, question of Benevolent Fund and Group Insurance is to be decided. Learned AAG and officer in attendance, undertake that right of petitioner to Benevolent Fund and Group Insurance would be decided accordingly. However, they have informed that Benevolent Fund is to be sanctioned by the Committee, constituted by the Deputy Commissioner. The said Committee is directed to consider the case of the petitioner in the light of available record and finalize the same within a period of one month next. Accordingly, in the above terms, this petition is disposed of. However, after one month, learned AAG will file compliance report for perusal in chamber. Let a copy of this order be supplied to learned AAG for perusal and compliance.
However, after one month, learned AAG will file compliance report for perusal in chamber. Let a copy of this order be supplied to learned AAG for perusal and compliance. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
